topStories.description: President Donald Trump on Sunday said his fellow Republicans should not reach an agreement on funding the Department of Homeland Security until Democrats in Congress approve a bill that requires people registering to vote to provide proof of US citizenship.

topStories.title: Quote of the Day by former US President Barack Obama: 'Make sure we're talking with each other in a way…'
topStories.description: Barack Obama emphasizes the importance of communication that heals rather than wounds, urging individuals to reflect on their speech's impact.

topStories.title: Trump To Feature On Gold Coin To Celebrate 250 Years Of US Independence
topStories.description: The 24-karat gold coin, portraying Trump leaning on the Resolute desk with clenched fists, will be the second time a living president has featured on a coin.

topStories.title: Road Rage Caught On Camera: US Woman Punches Pregnant Driver, Bites Cop
topStories.description: Authorities allege that Shaffer-Brockwell got out of her vehicle, ran toward the woman's SUV, climbed onto the hood, and forcefully opened the driver's door before punching the pregnant woman in the...

topStories.title: BJP minister Nandita Garlosa joins Congress day before Assam nomination deadline; to contest from Halflong
topStories.description: Haflong's sitting MLA Nandita Garlosa was denied a ticket by the BJP, which fielded Rupali Langthasa from the seat after dropping several sitting legislators.

topStories.title: Cuba Begins Power Restoration After Second Blackout Amid US Oil Blockade
topStories.description: Cuban authorities started to gradually restore power to the island Sunday after the second nationwide blackout in a week, as the grid struggles due to an aging infrastructure and a US oil blockade.

topStories.title: Vijay announces TVK candidates for all 30 Assembly segments in Puducherry
topStories.description: TVK president Vijay preparing to contest solo on April 9

topStories.title: World War 3, Rothschild banking in Iran: Former Trump ally reveals Netanyahu’s alleged plan, finds Epstein connection
topStories.description: Candace Owens' recent social media posts criticize Israel and the US-Iran conflict, expressing concern over potential World War 3. She has distanced herself from Trump and accused Israel of blackmailing the world while questioning Congress's ties to military interests.

topStories.title: "What If Donald Shouts At Me?": Trump Reposts Video Mocking UK's Starmer
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump shared a video on his Truth Social network of a TV comedy skit showing a terrified British Prime Minister Keir Starmer hoping to dodge a phone call with the American leader.

topStories.title: No let up in war & rhetoric, a break of 22,900 can take Nifty to 22,500
topStories.description: Geopolitical tensions and US President Donald Trump's stance on the Strait of Hormuz are creating market nervousness. Analysts predict Nifty will remain volatile this week. Key support is seen around 22,900, with a risk of decline to 22,500 if tensions escalate. Upside is expected to be capped between 23,400 and 24,200. Experts offer trading strategies and stock recommendations.

topStories.title: Cong names kin of deceased MLAs for 2 assembly bypolls
topStories.description: The Congress has nominated Umesh Meti and Samarth Mallikarjun for assembly by-elections in Bagalkot and Davangere South, respectively, amid internal discussions.

topStories.title: Iran's attack on Diego Garcia confirmed by UK. Was it linked to US use of base? Here's what British authorities said
topStories.description: Following initial reports of the attempted attack on Diego Garcia, the Israeli military on Saturday also said that Tehran had launched two intercontinental ballistic missiles at the military base, adding that such missiles demonstrated Tehran's capability to target the capitals of Europe.

dailyNews.title: How a ban on religious symbols has triggered a Canadian constitutional debate
dailyNews.description: Quebec's law to regulate religious symbols goes to the Supreme Court in a constitutional test case.

dailyNews.title: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE Updates: Oil prices rise after Iran threatens to close Strait of Hormuz ‘indefinitely’
dailyNews.description: US-Israel-Iran War LIVE Updates: Oil held near $112 (Brent) and $98 (WTI) as Trump's 48-hour Hormuz ultimatum and Tehran's counter-threats kept markets on edge — with Brent still up over 50% since the conflict began in late February.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist airport security as DHS shutdown continues
dailyNews.description: Travellers have faced hours-long waits at airports around the country as a partial government shutdown has left TSA agents without pay.

dailyNews.title: Iran says will hit region’s energy sites if US, Israel target power plants - Al Jazeera
dailyNews.description: Iran says will hit region’s energy sites if US, Israel target power plants  Al Jazeera

dailyNews.title: Opposition seeks arrest of AAP leader in Punjab
dailyNews.description: Congress, BJP, and SAD demand arrest of former AAP minister after warehousing corporation official’s death

dailyNews.title: National blackout hits Cuba for second time in a week
dailyNews.description: Another total failure of its power grid underlines Cuba's hardship under a US-imposed fuel blockade.

dailyNews.title: Trump mocks Schumer over ‘fund ICE’ gaffe in senate remarks | Watch
dailyNews.description: As the funding impasse continues, Trump is using moments like Schumer’s gaffe to sharpen their messaging. Republicans emphasize national security risks tied to the broader DHS shutdown, while Democrats focus on immediate disruptions affecting travelers and calls for immigration enforcement reforms.

dailyNews.title: Defeat of BJP must to save Assam, says citizen forum
dailyNews.description: The Assam Nagorik Sanmilani, which urged Raijor Dal on to join the Congress-led bloc a few days ago, says the BJP’s divisive politics have hollowed out the Assamese identity

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin moves closer to becoming DHS Secretary after Senate vote, faces final test amid shutdown crisis
dailyNews.description: With the final vote imminent, Mullin’s confirmation would place him at the helm of a deeply divided agency amid ongoing political battles over immigration policy and enforcement authority.

dailyNews.title: Iran warns of ‘complete closure’ of Strait of Hormuz if US targets its power plants
dailyNews.description: The warning follows a direct threat from Donald Trump, who said the US would strike Iran’s power infrastructure if the Strait is not reopened.

dailyNews.title: No end to Iran war soon? Team Trump says US has plenty of money to fund it
dailyNews.description: No end to Iran war soon Team Trump says US has plenty of money to fund it

dailyNews.title: Karnataka bypolls: Fear of rebellion looms large over Congress in Davangere
dailyNews.description: Though KPCC president and Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar claimed in Bengaluru that candidates’ selection for the Assembly bypoll was based on consensus and the decision was unanimous, a Congress leader and disappointed ticket aspirant for Davangere South constituency Mohammad Sadiq Pehelwan announced in Davangere that he would challenge Congress candidate Samarth as a rebel candidate

dailyNews.title: SNL UK sketch mocking Keir Starmer shared by Trump amid UK-US tensions | Watch
dailyNews.description: The clip, taken from the debut episode of Saturday Night Live UK was shared by Trump on his Truth Social platform on Sunday without comment.

dailyNews.title: Khandre honoured in Bidar after elevation as national president of Veerashaiva Lingayat Mahasabha
dailyNews.description: Speaking at the function, Siddharoodha Mutt seer Shivakumar Swamiji described Mr. Khandre as a leader shaped by his virtues, combining compassion, courage and commitment to public service

dailyNews.title: 'Will never be forgotten...' Iran expresses gratitude as Kashmiris donate gold, cash, copper utensils amid war
dailyNews.description: Kashmiri residents have launched a donation drive for Iran following recent US-Israel strikes, contributing cash, gold, and other valuables. The Iranian embassy thanked them for their support, while PM Narendra Modi discussed rising Middle East tensions with Iran’s President.

dailyNews.title: Israel Thought It Could Spur Rebellion Inside Iran. That Hasn’t Happened.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s hopes that an Israeli plan to ignite an internal uprising against Iran’s theocratic government could bring the war to a swift end have so far been dashed.

dailyNews.title: ICE to Help TSA at Airports Amid Partial Shutdown, Trump’s Border Czar Says
dailyNews.description: Tom Homan, President Trump’s chief border official, cast the operation largely as one to help ease long security lines. The Homeland Security Department said 14 airports across the country would be involved.

dailyNews.title: Don Lemon on Trump, Minnesota and Streaming on YouTube
dailyNews.description: A Minnesota church protest made the former anchor a star again — and a target for the Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Is the ‘Least Racist’ President. But His Term Echoes a Grim Past.
dailyNews.description: Woodrow Wilson’s presidency has taken on new resonance among historians and critics of President Trump, particularly when it comes to race.

dailyNews.title: Trump Has Made a Fundamental Miscalculation about Iran
dailyNews.description: America shouldn’t fight a war like this.

dailyNews.title: Trump, Starmer agree Strait of Hormuz must reopen as Middle East conflict escalates
dailyNews.description: Strait of Hormuz closure dominates a Trump-Starmer call, as Trump's 48-hour ultimatum to Iran warns of further U.S. strikes on Iranian energy infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Jeffries tells Trump to keep his 'reckless mouth shut' after president calls Democratic Party 'greatest enemy'
dailyNews.description: Hakeem Jeffries said Sunday that President Trump should keep his "reckless mouth shut" after the president called Democrats America's "greatest enemy" on Truth Social.

dailyNews.title: Cuban official reveals military 'preparing' for conflict after Trump considers 'taking' island
dailyNews.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister says the island is preparing for 'possible military aggression' amid Trump's remarks about 'taking' the nation in some form.
